component.name: AbraFlexi Report Tools
component.summary: Command-line tools for AbraFlexi custom reports

description.p: AbraFlexi Report Tools is a collection of command-line utilities for managing custom Jasper reports in the AbraFlexi accounting system. It covers the full report lifecycle: uploading compiled or source reports, unpacking report bundles into JasperStudio projects, previewing invoices, and keeping Jasper Studio classpaths in sync with the installed AbraFlexi version.

ul.li: abraflexi-upreport — upload or compile and upload Jasper report files to AbraFlexi
abraflexi-repxmlunpacker — create JasperStudio projects from AbraFlexi report installation files
abraflexi-previewreport — download and preview invoices in a specific report format
abraflexi-updatejasperclasspath — update Jasper Studio classpaths to match the installed AbraFlexi version

description.p: Launcher scripts now all begin with the abraflexi prefix.
